headline: Broadcom (AVGO) And OpenAI Launch Jalapeño AI Chip In Nine Months
summary: OpenAI and Broadcom have launched Jalapeño, a custom AI inference chip tailored for large language model workloads. The chip is the first product in a planned multi generation AI compute platform aimed at accelerating AI deployment. Jalapeño reached tape out in about nine months, highlighting rapid hardware and software co development between the two companies. For investors tracking Broadcom, ticker NasdaqGS:AVGO, Jalapeño adds a new layer to the company’s role in AI infrastructure. The...
